# Mexiletine Hydrochloride 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Mexiletine Hydrochloride 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Mexiletine Hydrochloride</strong> 目前有 <strong>17 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Mexiletine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Namuscla is indicated for the symptomatic treatment of myotonia in adult patients with non-dystrophic myotonic disorders.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.8%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（99.7%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（99.7%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（99.7%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（99.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.5%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（99.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/mexiletine-hydrochloride/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
